# Premier Party Cruises
> Austin's premier boat rental and party cruise experience on Lake Travis

## About
Premier Party Cruises offers party boat rentals on Lake Travis, Austin, specializing in the ATX Disco Cruise and Private Cruises.

## Services
- ATX Disco Cruise: All-inclusive multi-group bachelor/bachelorette parties
- Private Cruises: Exclusive boat charters for 14-75 guests
- Corporate Events: Team building and client entertainment
- Wedding Events: Rehearsal dinners, welcome parties, after parties

## Contact
Website: https://www.premierpartycruises.com
Phone: 512-669-6637
